nasb.text: The Lord your God is in your midst, A victorious warrior. He will exult over you with joy, He will be quiet in His love, He will rejoice over you with shouts of joy.

esv.text: The Lord your God is in your midst, a mighty one who will save; he will rejoice over you with gladness; he will quiet you by his love; he will exult over you with loud singing.

cnv.text: 耶和華你的　神在你中間， 他是施行拯救的大能者， 必因你歡欣快樂， 必默然愛你， 而且必因你喜樂歡唱。”

ccb.text: 你的上帝耶和华与你同在， 祂是大能的拯救者， 祂必因你而欢喜快乐，欢然歌唱， 用祂的爱安慰你。”
